description: Fetch Google Trends daily trending searches. Returns ranked trending keywords with search volume, percentage change, time started, active status, and related topics. Supports filtering by country/region via 2-letter ISO geo code (e.g. US, JP, HK). No authentication required.

parameters.name: geo
parameters.description: 2-letter ISO country code for the trending region (e.g. US, JP, HK, GB, KR). CN is not supported and will be rejected. Defaults to US.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of trending items to return. Defaults to returning all available items.
